_description: Volatile configuration for render-project-setup. Re-read at invocation by SKILL.md Step 0.

cli.name: render-cli
cli._note: Render's primary path is GitHub-native auto-deploy + REST API; CLI is optional.

required.name: RENDER_API_KEY
required.description: API key used by GitHub Actions for deploy triggers

vars.name: RENDER_SERVICE_ID
vars.description: Render service id (per environment); use a GitHub Actions repository variable
